title: Trading Copilot Watchlist
description: Schema for strategy watchlist JSON files in data/watchlists/

opportunities.description: List of current trading opportunities for this strategy. Each item is either a Trade, MacroEvent, or PairTrade as defined in INSTRUCTIONS.TRADING.md.

ticker.description: Instrument symbol, or 'N/A' for pure macro calendar events

direction.description: Required for all Trade items. Omit only for MacroEvent items (ticker N/A).

risk_percent.description: Risk as a whole integer percentage, e.g. 2 means 2% of capital. Do NOT use 0.02. Display logic in TradeCard renders this directly as '2% risk'.

expected_holding_days.description: Expected trade duration in calendar days. Drives the STALE badge in the SPA.

impact.description: MacroEvent only. Drives the Impact badge in the SPA.

event_tag.description: Short tag linking instrument plays to calendar events, e.g. 'nfp', 'cpi', 'ism', 'fomc', 'ecb', 'earnings', 'geopolitical'

tradeable_instruments.description: MacroEvent only. Instruments most likely to move on this event.

recommended_action.description: MacroEvent only. e.g. 'wait for data', 'reduce exposure', 'partial de-risk'

risk_reward.description: Optional explicit R:R string e.g. '1:3'. SPA calculates R:R from entry/stop/target automatically.
